abilities.name: Return Fire (Mask)
abilities.description: After this character succeeds, attacker suffers damage from one of this character's readied Pistol weapons. Damage flip receives -.

abilities.name: Bulletproof +1
abilities.description: Reduce all damage from Ranged Combat attacks by 1 (minimum 1).

abilities.name: Gunfighter
abilities.description: May use Pistols as if Range y2.

actions: (1) Weshorn & Smitte (Pistol) | AV: 5 (12) | Rg: y2 or z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 1. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram.
system.notes: Condemned criminals pressed into Soulstone mine labor who escaped. Survive as hired guns, always moving, always watching.
